g.text: Checks signature + expiry — no network call needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a refresh token and how is it stored?')
g.text: SDK sends refresh token to IAM
POST /auth/refresh — refresh token in body (never in a header)
IAM looks up SHA-256 hash of token — plaintext never stored

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What checks does OpenGuard run before issuing a new JWT?')
g.text: Not revoked · not expired (30 days) · session still active
User not suspended · org policy still allows login

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens after a new JWT is issued on refresh?')
g.text: Fresh 1-hour JWT · old refresh token rotated
Audit event written · threat engine notified
